description: Catalog of remediation archetype definitions for the Condition Pattern Library. Each archetype defines a recurring remediation strategy that may be referenced by condition patterns. Runtime may reference these archetypes but must not author new ones.

archetypes.label: Install Continuous Flashing
archetypes.description: Install continuous flashing from the roof membrane surface up the vertical substrate to a defined termination height. Flashing must be compatible with both the membrane system and the substrate material.

archetypes.label: Add Parapet Section Detail
archetypes.description: Create a full parapet section detail showing all layers: structural wall, air barrier, insulation, cladding, base flashing, through-wall flashing, cap flashing, and coping with dimensions and material callouts.

archetypes.label: Define Base Flashing Height
archetypes.description: Specify the minimum base flashing height (typically 8 inches minimum per code) and the attachment method to the vertical substrate.

archetypes.label: Add Termination Bar
archetypes.description: Specify and detail a mechanical termination bar including material (aluminum or stainless steel), profile, fastener type and spacing, and sealant bead above the bar.

archetypes.label: Specify Fastener Pattern
archetypes.description: Define fastener type, diameter, embedment depth, and spacing based on substrate material and wind uplift requirements at the specific building zone.

archetypes.label: Add Counterflashing Over Termination Bar
archetypes.description: Add a counterflashing detail that covers and protects the termination bar and sealant from UV exposure and direct weather.

archetypes.label: Assign Counterflashing Scope
archetypes.description: Issue a specification clarification or addendum assigning counterflashing installation to a specific trade, including coordination requirements with the adjacent roofing and masonry trades.

archetypes.label: Add Counterflashing Detail
archetypes.description: Create a counterflashing section detail showing the profile, reglet engagement or surface mount attachment, overlap with base flashing, and sealant locations.

archetypes.label: Coordinate Reglet Installation
archetypes.description: Define the installation sequence and coordination requirements for reglet cutting or casting between the masonry/concrete trade and the roofing/sheet metal trade.

archetypes.label: Revise Slope Design
archetypes.description: Revise the roof slope design to achieve minimum 1/4 inch per foot positive drainage to all drain locations, accounting for structural deflection and framing camber.

archetypes.label: Add Tapered Insulation Layout
archetypes.description: Create a tapered insulation layout plan showing slope directions, thickness at key points, cricket and saddle locations, and drain sump details.

archetypes.label: Relocate Drains
archetypes.description: Coordinate with structural and plumbing disciplines to relocate roof drains to positions compatible with the slope design and structural framing.

archetypes.label: Add Crickets at Penetrations
archetypes.description: Add tapered insulation crickets on the upslope side of roof penetrations and equipment pads to divert water around obstructions.

archetypes.label: Upgrade Insulation Compressive Strength
archetypes.description: Specify higher compressive strength insulation (e.g., upgrade from 20 psi to 40 psi polyiso) at equipment pad and high-traffic locations.

archetypes.label: Add Equipment Pad Detail
archetypes.description: Create an equipment pad detail showing load distribution platform, reinforced insulation zone, and membrane protection layer beneath the equipment support.

archetypes.label: Coordinate Insulation Specification
archetypes.description: Coordinate insulation specification requirements across roofing, structural, and mechanical disciplines to resolve conflicting R-value, compressive strength, or fire rating requirements.
